input.question: Which courses have the highest failure rate?

payload.question: Which courses have the highest failure rate?

output.sql:
WITH course_stats AS (
  SELECT
    e.course_id AS course_id,
    e.course_name AS course_name,
    COUNT(*) AS total_enrollments,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.grade < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_count,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.grade < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate
  FROM enrollments e
  WHERE e.grade IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY e.course_id, e.course_name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  total_enrollments,
  failed_count,
  failure_rate
FROM course_stats
ORDER BY failure_rate DESC
LIMIT 10;

payload.sql:
WITH course_stats AS (
  SELECT
    e.course_id AS course_id,
    e.course_name AS course_name,
    COUNT(*) AS total_enrollments,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.grade < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_count,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.grade < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate
  FROM enrollments e
  WHERE e.grade IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY e.course_id, e.course_name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  total_enrollments,
  failed_count,
  failure_rate
FROM course_stats
ORDER BY failure_rate DESC
LIMIT 10;
